tools_danger_zone_desc: 可能影响设备安全的破坏性操作

sp_fetching: 正在获取最新安全补丁...

control_toggle_adb_disabler_desc: Disable USB debugging, developer options, and OEM unlock at boot
control_toggle_rom_fingerprint_desc: Clean custom ROM identity from build properties at boot
adb_disabler_dialog_desc: Choose which developer settings to disable at boot.
adb_disabler_dev_options_desc: Disables developer options toggle in Settings

gms_clear_data_desc: Run pm clear on Play Store to reset its state
control_auto_target_desc: Watch for new app installs and auto-add to target.txt

boot_harden_dialog_desc: Choose which hardening measures to apply at boot.
restore_backups_desc: 从首次启动的备份中恢复您原始的 Tricky Store 文件
